title: Digital Twins for Mental Health Clinician Training
acronym_expansion: Steering-Vector Enhanced LLM Agents for Realistic Digital Twins in Mental Health
summary: AI-powered patient simulations using large language models enhanced with Conceptors — advanced steering vectors enabling precise control over psychiatric symptom presentations — for scalable, equitable clinician training worldwide.

aims.primary: Develop and validate STELLAR, a system for training mental health clinicians through realistic, controllable digital patient twins using LLMs enhanced with Conceptors.
aims.secondary: Use Conceptors to perform robustness analysis of diagnostic tools for depression, anxiety, and psychosis — testing demographic invariance and identifying bias.
aims.exploratory: Evaluate whether fine-tuning multi-speaker TTS models on clinical interview audio improves digital twin voice authenticity.
